EQUIPMENT LEASE AGREEMENT

This Equipment Lease Agreement ("Lease") is entered into as of June 1, 2025 between Northwind Capital LLC ("Lessor") and the lessee identified on the schedule attached hereto ("Lessee").

1. LEASE OF EQUIPMENT.
Lessor leases to Lessee, and Lessee leases from Lessor, the equipment described in the schedule (the "Equipment") for the term specified therein.

2. TERM AND AUTOMATIC RENEWAL.
The initial term of this Lease shall be sixty (60) months, commencing on the acceptance date set forth in the schedule. UPON EXPIRATION OF THE INITIAL TERM, THIS LEASE SHALL AUTOMATICALLY RENEW FOR SUCCESSIVE TWELVE (12) MONTH PERIODS UNLESS LESSEE PROVIDES WRITTEN NOTICE OF TERMINATION TO LESSOR AT LEAST ONE HUNDRED EIGHTY (180) DAYS BUT NOT MORE THAN TWO HUNDRED SEVENTY (270) DAYS PRIOR TO THE END OF THE THEN-CURRENT TERM. Rent during any renewal term shall be at the same rate as the final month of the prior term.

3. RENT.
Lessee shall pay rent in the amounts and at the times set forth in the schedule. All rent obligations are absolute and unconditional and shall not be subject to any abatement, set-off, defense, or counterclaim for any reason whatsoever.

4. INDEMNIFICATION.
LESSEE SHALL DEFEND, INDEMNIFY, AND HOLD LESSOR HARMLESS FROM AND AGAINST ANY AND ALL CLAIMS, LOSSES, DAMAGES, INJURIES, AND LIABILITIES OF ANY KIND, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO CLAIMS BASED ON STRICT LIABILITY OR THE NEGLIGENCE OF LESSOR, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO THE EQUIPMENT, ITS USE, OPERATION, MAINTENANCE, OR POSSESSION. LESSEE'S INDEMNIFICATION OBLIGATIONS HEREUNDER ARE UNCAPPED.

5. DISCLAIMER; LIMITATION OF LIABILITY.
LESSOR MAKES NO WARRANTIES, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING ANY WARRANTY OF MERCHANTABILITY OR FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. IN NO EVENT SHALL LESSOR BE LIABLE TO LESSEE FOR ANY DAMAGES WHATSOEVER, INCLUDING DIRECT, INDIRECT, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, AND LESSOR'S MAXIMUM LIABILITY UNDER THIS LEASE SHALL NOT EXCEED ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($100.00).

6. GOVERNING LAW; VENUE.
This Lease shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York. Lessee irrevocably consents to the exclusive jurisdiction and venue of the state and federal courts located in New York County, New York, and waives any right to a jury trial.

7. ASSIGNMENT.
Lessor may assign this Lease, in whole or in part, to any third party without notice to or consent from Lessee. Lessee may not assign or sublease the Equipment or this Lease without Lessor's prior written consent, which Lessor may withhold in its sole discretion.
